result.stdout:
USAGE:
    uno-check [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    check      
    list       
    config

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    uno-check [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    check      
    list       
    config

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    uno-check check [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                               Prints help information            
    -m, --manifest <FILE_OR_URL>                                                
    -f, --fix                                                                   
    -n, --non-interactive                                                       
    -s, --skip <CHECKUP_ID>                                                     
    -d, --pre                                                                   
        --pre-major                                                             
        --dev-manifest                                                          
        --dotnet <SDK_ROOT>                                                     
        --force-dotnet                                                          
    -v, --verbose                                                               
        --ci                                                                    
    -l, --logfile <PATH>                                                        
        --target <TARGET_PLATFORM_ID>        Run checks for a specific target   
                                             platform. Use the --target option  
                                             multiple times to run checks for   
                                             multiple platforms, or omit it to  
                                             run checks for all supported       
                                             platforms.                         
                                             Targets: webassembly ios android   
                                             macos linux windows                
        --tfm <TARGET_FRAMEWORK>             Run checks for a specific TFM. Use 
                                             the --framework option multiple    
                                             times to run checks for multiple   
                                             TFM's, or omit it to run checks for
                                             all supported platforms            
        --ide <IDE_NAME>                     This parameter skips some checks   
                                             based on the IDE which is used to  
                                             run the Uno.Check                  
        --unoSdkVersion <UNO_SDK_VERSION>    Uno SDK Checkup will validate if   
                                             provided Uno SDK version is        
                                             installed

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    uno-check check [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                               Prints help information            
    -m, --manifest <FILE_OR_URL>                                                
    -f, --fix                                                                   
    -n, --non-interactive                                                       
    -s, --skip <CHECKUP_ID>                                                     
    -d, --pre                                                                   
        --pre-major                                                             
        --dev-manifest                                                          
        --dotnet <SDK_ROOT>                                                     
        --force-dotnet                                                          
    -v, --verbose                                                               
        --ci                                                                    
    -l, --logfile <PATH>                                                        
        --target <TARGET_PLATFORM_ID>        Run checks for a specific target   
                                             platform. Use the --target option  
                                             multiple times to run checks for   
                                             multiple platforms, or omit it to  
                                             run checks for all supported       
                                             platforms.                         
                                             Targets: webassembly ios android   
                                             macos linux windows                
        --tfm <TARGET_FRAMEWORK>             Run checks for a specific TFM. Use 
                                             the --framework option multiple    
                                             times to run checks for multiple   
                                             TFM's, or omit it to run checks for
                                             all supported platforms            
        --ide <IDE_NAME>                     This parameter skips some checks   
                                             based on the IDE which is used to  
                                             run the Uno.Check                  
        --unoSdkVersion <UNO_SDK_VERSION>    Uno SDK Checkup will validate if   
                                             provided Uno SDK version is        
                                             installed

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    uno-check config [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                           Prints help information
    -m, --manifest <FILE_OR_URL>                                
    -d, --pre                                                   
        --pre-major                                             
        --dev-manifest                                          
    -n, --non-interactive                                       
        --nuget                                                 
        --dotnet                                                
        --dotnet-pre <VALUE>                                    
        --dotnet-rollforward <OPTION>

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    uno-check list [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                           Prints help information                
    -m, --manifest <FILE_OR_URL>                                                
    -d, --pre                                                                   
        --pre-major                                                             
        --dev-manifest                                                          
    -n, --non-interactive                                                       
        --target <TARGET_PLATFORM_ID>    List checks for a specific target      
                                         platform. Use the --target option      
                                         multiple times for multiple platforms, 
                                         or omit it to list checks for all      
                                         supported platforms

commands.payload:
